mapper.select:
SELECT ti.file_name, ss.single_id, ss.slide_id, ss.image_url, ss.category_id, fc.organ_name, fs.group_code, fs.wax_code, fs.animal_code, fs.gender_flag, fs.initiate_by, fs.initiate_time FROM fr_single_slide ss LEFT JOIN fr_slide fs ON ss.slide_id = fs.slide_id LEFT JOIN fr_category fc ON ss.category_id = fc.category_id left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id
fs.special_id = #{specialId} and fs.process_flag = '2'
and ti.file_name like concat('%',#{fileName},'%')
and fs.initiate_by = #{initiateBy}
AND date_format(fs.initiate_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{initiateTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.initiate_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{initiateTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by fs.initiate_time desc
